pullRequest.title: Add `explain` command to CLI
pullRequest.description:
This change introduces a new `explain` command to the command-line interface. When run, this command prints a concise, step-by-step summary of the application's file renaming algorithm. This serves as a convenient, built-in documentation feature for users who want to understand the core logic of the tool without needing to inspect the source code.
